title: Un Viaggio Sostenibile a Roma
gcseTheme: Theme 2: Local, National, International and Global Areas
examFocus: Speaking photo card (holidays), role play (transport), environment opinions

lines.italian: Quest'estate vado a Roma con la mia famiglia.
lines.english: This summer I am going to Rome with my family.

lines.italian: Roma è la capitale d'Italia. È una città bellissima.
lines.english: Rome is the capital of Italy. It is a beautiful city.

lines.italian: Andiamo in treno. Non andiamo in aereo.
lines.english: We are going by train. We are not going by plane.

lines.italian: Il treno è più ecologico dell'aereo.
lines.english: The train is more ecological than the plane.
The journey lasts four hours.

lines.italian: Mio padre compra i biglietti online.
lines.english: My father buys the tickets online.
One ticket costs fifty euros.
We have to change trains in Milan.
My mother doesn't love traveling.
She prefers to stay at home.

lines.italian: Ma Roma è speciale. Lei vuole vedere Roma.
lines.english: But Rome is special. She wants to see Rome.

lines.italian: A Roma c'è il Colosseo. È molto antico.
lines.english: In Rome there is the Colosseum. It is very ancient.
I want to take many photos.
I will think about the environment during the trip.

lines.italian: Non useremo la macchina a Roma.
lines.english: We will not use the car in Rome.
We will use public transport.
We will take the bus and the metro.
We will walk a lot. Walking is good.
The environment is important to me.
Pollution is a big problem.
Cars pollute the air.
We must protect the environment.
Global warming is dangerous.

lines.italian: Riciclo la plastica e la carta.
lines.english: I recycle plastic and paper.

lines.italian: Non uso le bottiglie di plastica.
lines.english: I don't use plastic bottles.
I use a steel water bottle.
This trip will be ecological.

lines.italian: Mi piace viaggiare in modo sostenibile.
lines.english: I like to travel in a sustainable way.

lines.italian: Roma è bellissima. Non vedo l'ora!
lines.english: Rome is beautiful. I can't wait!

lines.italian: Voglio proteggere la città che amo.
lines.english: I want to protect the city that I love.

examPractice.rolePlay: Ask for train tickets. Where are you going? When? How much?
examPractice.photoCard: Describe a photo of Rome/Colosseum. What can you see? What are people doing?
examPractice.opinionQuestion: What do you think about the environment? Is travel bad for the planet?
